calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Brenda Fields, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner: Jennifer Elizabeth Roddick, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Jennifer Elizabeth Roddick Gillis.
Decree signed in open court.
